meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: Now I... shall feed... the soil...
These ancient grounds are not for you!
quotes.transcript: These ancient grounds are not for you!

quotes.text: You disturb nature's perfection!
quotes.transcript: You disturb nature's perfection!

quotes.text: Feel your throat tighten!
quotes.transcript: Feel your throat tighten!

quotes.text: This breath will be your last!
quotes.transcript: This breath will be your last.

quotes.text: I will crush the life from you!
quotes.transcript: I will crush the life from you!

quotes.text: My tendrils will take you!
quotes.transcript: My tenderness will take you all.

quotes.text: Fodder for the compost heap!
quotes.transcript: FARDERS OF THE COMPUSE KINTH!

quotes.text: Food for the worms!
quotes.transcript: Food for the Worms!

quotes.text: They did not show the proper respect to nature.
quotes.transcript: They did not show the proper respect to nature.

quotes.text: Mortals seldom appreciate true beauty.
quotes.transcript: Mortal sound, I appreciate. Cove, beauty.

quotes.text: My end... was written... in the rings...
quotes.transcript: My end was written in the rings.

quotes.text: Yes, my precious ones, the Fel has brought out our troll beauty!
quotes.transcript: Yes, my precious ones, the Fel has brought out our troll beauty!

quotes.text: Fiends! Tear down that shield!
The full might of the Legion falls upon you!
This world... will belong... to the Legion...
Your flesh will burn!
Thanks for watching!
quotes.transcript: Thanks for watching!

quotes.text: Tra venturer
quotes.transcript: Tra venturer

quotes.text: Thanks for watching!
quotes.transcript: Thanks for watching!

quotes.text: This shield has fallen! Leave no survivors!
quotes.transcript: This shield has fallen! Leave no survivors!

quotes.text: Thanks for watching!
quotes.transcript: Thanks for watching!

quotes.text: Kil'jaeden sends his gratitude for delivering the Aegis into our hands.
quotes.transcript: Kil'jaeden sends his gratitude for delivering the Aegis into our hands.

quotes.text: My ex-hungers for flesh!
quotes.transcript: My ex-hungers for flesh!

quotes.text: Legion! Scorched him to the bone!
quotes.transcript: Legion! Scorched him to the bone!

quotes.text: Inferno's! Devastate their rights!
quotes.transcript: Inferno's! Devastate their rights!

quotes.text: I will hold the skies. See to the Aegis!
Leave none standing! If we fail here, Azeroth burns.
There is nowhere you can flee that I cannot reach you, demon!
It seems preparations are in order.
Let them come. Maiev and I will hold them on the stairs below.
Posture if you must, Maiev, but for now, do what you do best and follow me.
The demon Dresanoth lurks among the naga. Destroy any foe who stands in your path and scour this filth from our world!
The echo of the Guardian Aegwynn appears, just as she did in the cathedral.

I am Aegwynn, Guardian of Tirisfal. I left behind this echo of my power as a safeguard in the event that the wards I put in place to protect the tomb failed. Indeed, I sense that the master of the Burning Legion now schemes to claim his prize.
I will continue the hunt for Illidan. You deal with those abominations.
Did you really think you could elude me, Illidan? Run again and I'll shackle you like the beast you are.
Illidan! Curse that impetuous demon hunter!
Can it be? The Guardian!
Forgive me if my glaive finds your heart, Illidan. With so many demons about, it's hard to distinguish you from the rest of this filth.
Our forces have engaged the Legion on the ground floor. We must place the Aegis in the tower before our losses grow insurmountable.
Surrender the shield and I will grant you a quick death!
The final... victory... will be ours...
Ah, our guests of honor have finally arrived. I look forward to ripping those horns from your skull, betrayer!
quotes.transcript: Ah, our guests of honor have finally arrived. I look forward to ripping those horns from your skull, betrayer!

quotes.text: Pathetic! My time is wasted here! With the power from the tomb, I will destroy all of you!
quotes.transcript: Pathetic! My time is wasted here! With the power from the tomb, I will destroy all of you!

quotes.text: Your persistence will be the death of you! Minions attack!
quotes.transcript: Your persistence will be the death of you! Minions attack!

quotes.text: I'm here. I'm here. I'm here.
quotes.transcript: I'm here. I'm here. I'm here.

quotes.text: Never her accident!
quotes.transcript: Never her accident!

quotes.text: daaaaaaaaaaaaaa
quotes.transcript: daaaaaaaaaaaaaa

quotes.text: I'm here. I'm here. I'm here.
quotes.transcript: I'm here. I'm here. I'm here.

quotes.text: As for you treacherous skull, I'll deal with you later.
quotes.transcript: As for you treacherous skull, I'll deal with you later.

quotes.text: Run! Ha ha ha ha! Fool! I have led you to the slaughter!
quotes.transcript: Run! Ha ha ha ha! Fool! I have led you to the slaughter!

quotes.text: Beware the shadows!
quotes.transcript: Beware the shadows!

quotes.text: It amuses me to watch you suffer.
quotes.transcript: It amuses me to watch you suffer.

quotes.text: I'm tired of these games! Let us see how you fare without your little trinket.
quotes.transcript: I'm tired of these games! Let us see how you fare without your little trinket.

quotes.text: Hello, mid-last.
quotes.transcript: Hello, mid-last.

quotes.text: Thank you for watching!
quotes.transcript: Thank you for watching!

quotes.text: Ha ha ha ha! Foolish warlock! Did you really think I would remain unaware of your infantile plot to steal my treasure? You underestimate Anathrasim!
quotes.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! Foolish warlock! Did you really think I would remain unaware of your infantile plot to steal my treasure? You underestimate Anathrasim!

quotes.text: Come to me, servant of Hellfire! Rid me of this un-invited guest!
quotes.transcript: Come to me, servant of Hellfire! Rid me of this un-invited guest!

quotes.text: Fire the guns! Cover the path and hellfire! Don't let that warlock through!
quotes.transcript: Fire the guns! Cover the path and hellfire! Don't let that warlock through!

quotes.text: Enjoy your victory while you can Warlock. Ha ha ha ha ha ha! This isn't over between us. It has only begun.
quotes.transcript: Enjoy your victory while you can Warlock. Ha ha ha ha ha ha! This isn't over between us. It has only begun.

quotes.text: Did you think I would stand idle as you clawed your way through my minions? Listen mortal, as the treasure you fight so hard to obtain is broken to my will!
quotes.transcript: Did you think I would stand idle as you clawed your way through my minions? Listen mortal, as the treasure you fight so hard to obtain is broken to my will!

quotes.text: I grow tired of your interference! Die!
quotes.transcript: I grow tired of your interference! Die!

quotes.text: You cannot withstand the power of the Legion!
quotes.transcript: You cannot withstand the power of the Legion!

quotes.text: How kind of you to bring the ages to me!
quotes.transcript: How kind of you to bring the ages to me!

quotes.text: You destroy a few ships and claim a victory. It will be your last I assure you. Savor this moment. For our next meeting we'll spell your doom.
quotes.transcript: You destroy a few ships and claim a victory. It will be your last I assure you. Savor this moment. For our next meeting we'll spell your doom.

quotes.text: Yes, come forth! I could use some entertainment!
quotes.transcript: Yes, come forth! I could use some entertainment!

quotes.text: Another foolish mortal wishes to face me? So be it.
quotes.transcript: Another foolish mortal wishes to face me? So be it.

quotes.text: Didn't... think this... through...
Little fools, what a outsmart religion? Think again!
quotes.transcript: Little fools, what a outsmart religion? Think again!

quotes.text: Gonna run you dummies over!
quotes.transcript: Gonna run you dummies over!

quotes.text: Don't need bucks when I got fizzes!
quotes.transcript: Don't need bucks when I got fizzes!

quotes.text: Stand still, Wimps!
quotes.transcript: Stand still, Wimps!

quotes.text: Come here and fight!
quotes.transcript: Come here and fight!

quotes.text: Come and get it!
quotes.transcript: Come and get it!

quotes.text: Dead doofus!
quotes.transcript: Dead doofus!

quotes.text: Ha! Who's the smart one now?
quotes.transcript: Ha! Who's the smart one now?

quotes.text: Shut up! Stay in school!
quotes.transcript: Shut up! Stay in school!

quotes.text: I'll stop you!
quotes.transcript: I'll stop you!

quotes.text: Books are for users!
quotes.transcript: Books are for users!

quotes.text: Learned your lesson!
quotes.transcript: Learned your lesson!
